scope: wave2 fan-out migration, completed: both legacy streams. detailed_notes' per-note GET /notes/{id} sub-resource fan-out, previously blocked (ENGINE_GAP: no declarative fan-out mechanism, would have required a StreamHook), is now expressed via streams.json's fan_out.ids_from.request dialect (S4 engine mini-wave item 2) — the same list-then-detail shape google-tasks' tasks stream uses.
